EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to access the web resource {dst.host} due to the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to access the web resource {dst.host}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} accessed the web resource {dst.host} in violation of the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} accessed the web resource {dst.host}
